role: Vimachem - IIoT Pharma 4.0 AI Platform hiring BΙ & Data Engineer in Greece | Lin

evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: This is a hands-on, individual-contributor role. You will personally design the data models, build the pipelines, write the SQL, and craft pixel-perfect, performant Metabase dashboards.
evidence.velocity_vs_rigour_explanation: The JD is dominated by delivery/craft/speed language (build, ship, pixel-perfect, fast) with quality framed as "craft" rather than compliance/testing/governance, though data quality for AI datasets is mentioned, landing on mixed.
evidence.domain_risk: At Vimachem, we build the software that powers pharmaceutical and biotech manufacturing.
evidence.domain_risk_explanation: The platform serves regulated pharma/biotech manufacturing (MES, Pharma 4.0), but the JD frames the AE role itself around commercial SaaS reporting rather than explicit regulatory/compliance duties for the role, so moderate applies.
evidence.data_team_maturity: You will be the first dedicated BI & Data hire at Vimachem, giving you a rare opportunity to define the company's analytics foundations from the ground up.
evidence.data_team_maturity_explanation: The JD explicitly states the candidate will be the first dedicated BI/data hire, a textbook signal of an early-stage data function being built from scratch.
evidence.jd_authorship: You will personally design the data models, build the pipelines, write the SQL, and craft pixel-perfect, performant Metabase dashboards. You will own the reporting experience the same way a product engineer owns a feature.
evidence.jd_authorship_explanation: The JD gives vivid, specific detail about day-to-day work (Metabase modeling layer, query tuning, schema/event design) that only a hiring manager with direct knowledge of the role would write.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation: Work daily with product (on what each module should report on) and engineering (on how the source data should look).
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: Product and engineering are named as the two primary, roughly co-equal partners with no single one dominant, so mixed applies.
evidence.autonomy_level: You will be the first dedicated BI & Data hire at Vimachem, giving you a rare opportunity to define the company's analytics foundations from the ground up. You'll have significant influence over tooling, modeling standards, reporting architecture.
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: As the first dedicated BI/data hire, the candidate explicitly defines standards, architecture, and tooling direction rather than executing someone else's plan, a strategic mandate.
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix: You will be the first dedicated BI & Data hire at Vimachem, giving you a rare opportunity to define the company's analytics foundations from the ground up.
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix_explanation: The JD explicitly states this is the first dedicated BI/data hire building analytics foundations from the ground up, a textbook greenfield mandate.
evidence.ai_role: Support AI and ML initiatives by preparing and maintaining high-quality datasets the AI features on our platform can build on
evidence.ai_role_explanation: The candidate builds and maintains datasets that the platform's AI features consume, placing them downstream of the candidate's output rather than as a personal coding-assistance tool.
evidence.testing_framing: Tune slow queries and dashboards; fix bottlenecks at the SQL, schema, or aggregation layer
evidence.testing_framing_explanation: Responsibilities focus on performance tuning and report craft with no data-quality ownership verbs, dbt tests, or data-contract language anywhere in the JD.
evidence.loss_aversion_framing: Track usage and feedback on reports; double down on what matters, retire what doesn't
evidence.loss_aversion_framing_explanation: The JD is framed entirely in product/delivery terms (craft, usage tracking, iteration) with no compliance, audit, or operational-incident language.
